hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-serif
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-serif

layout.structure: 2-column bento style grid on desktop (lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8)
layout.right_column: col-span-12 lg:col-span-4 (Reservation form + Cart Sidebar, sticky on desktop)

header.style: Full width, 40vh height minimum. Background image of premium restaurant interior. Overlay bg-[#082c59]/60 for crisp contrast.
header.content: Restaurant Name, Location, Rating (Gold stars #C5A880), Operating Hours
header.font: Playfair Display for name, bright white text.

menu_item.style: Flex container, items-start. Border-b border-[#E2E8F0] pb-8 mb-8. Generous gap-6.
menu_item.image_carousel: w-32 h-32 md:w-40 md:h-40 flex-shrink-0 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm
menu_item.interactions: Swipeable images (max 3). 'View Ingredients' link text-sm text-[#C5A880] underline underline-offset-4 hover:text-[#082c59] cursor-pointer

reservation_section.style: bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(8,44,89,0.06)] border border-[#E2E8F0]/50
reservation_section.sizing: Compact. Uses minimal padding for inputs, 2-column grid for date/time/guests.
reservation_section.button: bg-[#082c59] text-white hover:bg-[#051A35] rounded-full px-6 py-3 w-full transition-colors

cart_summary.style: bg-[#F9F9F7] p-6 rounded-2xl border border-[#E2E8F0] mt-6
cart_summary.button: bg-[#C5A880] text-[#1A1D20] hover:bg-[#A98E64] rounded-full font-bold px-6 py-3 w-full

tabs.style: Horizontal scroll, hide scrollbar. Active: bg-[#082c59] text-white. Inactive: bg-white text-[#64748B] border border-[#E2E8F0]

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons and a carousel library (like 'embla-carousel-react' via shadcn) for the swipeable image carousel in menu items.
Ensure 'Playfair Display' (serif) and 'Manrope' (sans) fonts are imported via Google Fonts in the main index.css and configured in tailwind.config.js.
Implement a responsive 2-column layout (lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8), where the left menu column is col-span-8 and the right cart/reservation column is col-span-4.
Make the right column sticky (e.g., sticky top-8) so Cart and Reservation remain visible as the user scrolls the menu on desktop.
Instead of a modal, render the Reservation form as a compact inline card in the right column. This saves space and provides an elegant feel. (Optionally use floating labels or dense shadcn inputs).
For the Menu item image carousel, allow max 3 images. Show pagination dots within the carousel.
Use Shadcn Dialog (Modal) for the 'Ingredients' modal triggered by clicking 'View Ingredients'.
Ensure the price is formatted elegantly, explicitly showing 'FCFA'.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, modals, carousel arrows).
